span.p:
Discovery + consensus + validation already ran
provenance, sourceResults, completenessStats,
identityGate, identityConfidence,
publishable, publishBlockers, identityReport

Filter helper synthetic sources
for hypothesisQueue + fieldReasoning only

missingRequiredFields
sourceIntel domains
maxHypothesisItems

buildFieldReasoning()
unknown_reason + contradictions
blocked/budget story
searchAttemptCount

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
buildTrafficLight()
green = component_db or Tier 1
yellow = Tier 2
red = unknown or weak evidence

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
deriveNeedSetIdentityState()

status, confidence, publishable,
publish_blockers, reason_codes,
contradictions, max_match_score,
audit_rows
extraction_gate_open = true
